mapper.sql: v.ma AS ma, v.ma AS ma_ve, v.ma_khuyen_mai AS ma_khuyen_mai, v.so_tien_thanh_toan AS so_tien, COALESCE(h.ma_loai, 'UNKNOWN') AS phuong_thuc, CASE WHEN v.trang_thai = 'PAID' THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE v.trang_thai END AS trang_thai, v.ma_don_payos AS ma_don_payos, v.thoi_gian_thanh_toan AS thoi_gian_tao
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ve_xe v LEFT JOIN hinh_thuc_thanh_toan h ON v.ma_hinh_thuc = h.ma WHERE v.ma = #{ma} AND v.trang_thai = 'PAID'
SELECT FROM ve_xe v LEFT JOIN hinh_thuc_thanh_toan h ON v.ma_hinh_thuc = h.ma WHERE v.trang_thai = 'PAID' ORDER BY v.thoi_gian_thanh_toan DESC
SELECT FROM ve_xe v LEFT JOIN hinh_thuc_thanh_toan h ON v.ma_hinh_thuc = h.ma WHERE v.ma_khach = #{maKhach} AND v.trang_thai = 'PAID' ORDER BY v.thoi_gian_thanh_toan DESC
